Products
EPS | Electric Propulsion Systems
In range 3kW up to 400kW, meeting highest demands of most advanced applications, e.g. eVTOLs, UAVs, UGVs, marine, defence and other industries, from large series of systems ready for in-building to special tailor-made units.
go to category
ESS | Batteries
Energy Storage Systems designed according to the customers’ requirements with the most sophisticated technology focusing on the best use of energy, intelligent BMS, active & passive safety systems, effective mass production and certification.
go to category
Controllers | Inverters | ESCs
HBCi controllers represent state of the art technology of electric motor control. Ranging from 3kW up to 400kW, manufactured in many variants to completely fulfill customers’ needs. Unrivalled performance, power density ratio, redundancy, safety and innovation.
go to category
Electric motors
The all new generation of MGM COMPRO electric motors (BLDC / PMSM) brings enhanced potential to electric applications. Based on the innovative topology of the motor magnetic field and winding design, we have achieved higher power density than ever before.
go to category
Gearbox Systems
Gearbox systems for high performance in-runner electric motors offer functionality for the control of single action hydraulic const. speed propellers. Parallelly provides range of safety features incl. the overspeed protection and conventional control logic.
Gearbox Systems
BMS | Battery Management Systems
MGM COMPRO BMS systems provide unique care for cells and complex storage systems (ESS). Innovative methods determining residual cell energy, modularity, unique safety, redundancy and cutting-edge paramaters throughout the whole BMS family.
go to category
Simulations | AnSys | Matlab
Development approach using ANSYS multi-purpose simulation software enables engineers to model, analyze and solve complex engineering challenges efficiently, i.e. tool to innovate and optimaze the performance leading to new generations of hi-tech products.
go to category
Testing | Validation | Qualification
Crucial and irreplaceable tool in the professional development process is validation of expected results and simulated values. Equally important is testing to fine-tune specific EPS. We offer a wide range of testing up to 500kW, including coaxial setups.
go to category
Electronic
Contactors
MGM COMPRO electronic and hybrid contactors represent intelligent substitute for mechanical contactors, featuring unlimited number of cycles, lower weight, signif. lower consumption, automatic anti-spark, intelligent control modes etc.
go to category

about.text:
Company | MGM COMPRO
MGM COMPRO
For over 30 years, we specialize in designing advanced e-powertrains and special electronics. Our mission lies commitment to innovation, safety and efficiency combined with compact dimensions, minimal weight, cutting-edge features and parameters. This approach has established us as leaders in the industry, delivering solutions that redefine electric propulsion.
show more
About Us
At MGM COMPRO, we take pride in leading the way in the design and manufacture of sophisticated Electronics, Mechanics, Complex Electric Propulsion Units (Drive Systems, EPS, ESS, etc.) and its componets together with other special electronics. Whether it’s large-scale in-building systems or custom-tailored solutions, the goal is always to perfectly align with the customer’s requirements and innovative approach, that brings advantageous solutions and pushes the boundaries (ie. smaller, ligher, more compact and powerful, efficient, etc.). Our diverse portfolio includes Electronic Speed Controllers (Inverters), Electric Motors, Battery Systems (ESS), BMS, Charging Systems, Jet / Turbojet Engine Control Units, Fuel Metering Pump Control Units and more.
With a focus on various applications such as Electric Aircrafts, eVTOLs, Drones, UAVs, UGVs, UUVs, USVs, boats, military applications, jet-surfs & wake-boards and beyond, we are dedicated to making an impact globally. Our commitment is underscored by the deployment of unique testing/equipment, providing customers with exceptional data analysis and a complete spectrum of information.
Designing and Producing
Our approach to design and precision manufacturing is fueled by Research and Development (R&D) activities involving a team of software, hardware, and mechanical engineers, alongside in-house production capabilities and dedicated project managers, supported by outstanding customer service. These elements form the basis for the future of our cutting-edge e-mobility solutions.
Rigorous testing, prototyping, simulations, and calculations ensure that our solutions, consistently surpass industry benchmarks. Our unique testing equipment provides customers with comprehensive data analysis, covering a wide spectrum of data from propeller propulsion systems.
Our own design and production self-sufficiency sets us apart, operating with in-house production capabilities to ensure efficiency and quality control. This dedication makes us a stable and reliable partner with a longstanding presence in the market.
Our Vision
Cutting-edge solutions, continuous innovation, the power and passion to overcoming challenges posed by intelligent electronics. We aim to seamlessly integrate electric propulsion systems into everyday life, with a focus on enhancing efficiency and safety in the air, space, land, sea and under the water.
History
2025
The all new generation of MGM COMPRO electric motors (BLDC / PMSM), brings novatory design approach to most demanding technological challenges, excelling by cutting-edge performance, power density ratio, efficiency, safety, redundancy and other enhanced parameters.
2024
Significant expansion of activities and volumes in sector of special electronics for Jet / Turbojet Engine Control Units and Fuel Metering Pump Control Units.
2023
MGM COMPRO introduces state of the art High Power Electric Propulsion System (EPS) for Aviation. Innovative fully electric powertrain (EPS + ESS) for most demanding Aerospace applications focusing on very last details in terms of superb performance, power density, efficiency, safety, redundancy, durability and technological innovation.
2023
Establishment of cooperation, partnership and connection on the path to certified electric aviation with a leader in the field of airworthiness and military certification.
2022
Introduction of a high-speed 200kW electric motor and powertrian (EPS) for aviation excelling with its compact dimensions, low height, high efficiency and performance.
2021
MGM COMPRO works on the development of the 400kW pr

products.text:
Our Products | MGM COMPRO
Our Products
The MGM COMPRO portfolio represents exceptional set of products with wide range of power spectre. Unique DNA of MGM COMPRO innovative electric propulsion systems – powertrains (EPS, ESS) connects throughout the product family, stands out for the unrivalled performance, power density ratio, features, parameters, redundancy, capability to deliver certified solutions, together with in-house AS9100 compliant production lines.
show more
ELECTRIC
MOTORS | INVERTERS
ESCS | BATTERY | BMS | EPS | ESS
Intelligent and most advanced e-powertrain products and solutions. Single/multi-core as well as single/multi-winding innovative topology electric motors together with electronic speed controllers (inverters / ESCs) specially designed to operate together in the most sophisticated and redundant EPS architecture (using 1 or 2 or even 4 ESCs). Comprehensive A to Z product range, process-driven development using latest technology and simulation tools, combining high performance and efficient components/systems with exhaustive design for manufacturability (DFM).
EPS | Electric Propulsion Systems
In range 3kW up to 400kW, meeting highest demands of most advanced applications, e.g. eVTOLs, UAVs, UGVs, marine, defence and other industries, from large series of systems ready for in-building to special tailor-made units.
